sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28811" key="dusdiai/thtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσδιαίτητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28811.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to decide</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg037:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Comp.Cim.Luc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λόγος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:2:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
